title: CVE-2026-50751: Check Point Security Gateway IKEv1 Auth Bypass
summary: [P1] Check Point Security Gateway contains an improper authentication vulnerability in IKEv1 key exchange that could allow an attacker to bypass authentication. This vulnerability is being exploited in the wild and no patch is currently available. Why now: Reported exploitation in the wild without available patches. (confidence: 0.90)
classification_reasoning: Improper authentication vulnerability in IKEv1 key exchange allows for authentication bypass.
